old_claim.note: Backpropagation Training provides a capability that enables this technology without being the only possible path.

new_claim_absent: The founding 1980 Neocognitron architecture predates the scoped 1986 backpropagation procedure and was self-organizing.

source_shape.source_locator: Fukushima's 1980 paper presents the self-organizing Neocognitron architecture six years before the scoped 1986 backpropagation publication.
source_shape.source_claim_summary: The primary chronology shows that the founding CNN architecture cannot depend on the later Rumelhart-Hinton-Williams procedure.
source_shape.source_support_rationale: The corrected scope leaves this relationship outside the causal boundary. The founding 1980 Neocognitron architecture predates the scoped 1986 backpropagation procedure and was self-organizing.

ontology_before: convolutional_neural_networks treated backpropagation_training as a direct enabling relationship.
ontology_after: The founding 1980 Neocognitron architecture predates the scoped 1986 backpropagation procedure and was self-organizing.
invariant_preserved_or_changed: Changed: convolutional_neural_networks no longer has backpropagation_training as a direct prerequisite.
would_reject_if: A direct historical or technical source establishes backpropagation_training as a necessary causal input to the newly scoped convolutional_neural_networks claim.
short_reason: The founding 1980 Neocognitron architecture predates the scoped 1986 backpropagation procedure and was self-organizing.
